name: break room
hints: This is the break room. The sign in the control room said to use this room for beverages.
This is the safe place to defuse the bomb. You need the bomb and water here.
Bring the bomb and the water-filled pail here. POUR WATER on the bomb to defuse it safely.
With the time bomb and water-filled pail: POUR WATER here to defuse the bomb and complete the mission!

effects: Message: the water spills on the bomb and
Message: defuses it! FANTASTIC, You completed an IMPOSSIBLE mission!

notes: The break room - the SAFE place to defuse the bomb. POUR WATER here with both the bomb and water-filled pail to complete the mission. Do NOT pour water in the control room. WEST returns to the control room.
